meaning: 黎塞留河[加拿大东南部]
examples: A city of southern Quebec, Canada, on the Richelieu River east of Montreal.
Its large landlocked harbor was built in 1631 by Cardinal Richelieu as a military base and Arsenal.
Another delightful comparison likened Putin to Cardinal Richelieu, with Medvedev cast in the role of Louis XIII.
In Friday trading, Richelieu Hardware Ltd. shares are currently down about 0.4% on the day.
In Friday trading, Richelieu Hardware Ltd. shares are currently off about 1.2% on the day.
